category_sources: source_facts.description says rsgain is a ReplayGain 2.0 tagging utility; official GitHub repository describes it as a ReplayGain tagging utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rsgain; official GitHub repository is complexlogic/rsgain.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for rsgain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/complexlogic/rsgain, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ReplayGain 2.0 tagging; official GitHub repository description confirms the audio tagging purpose.
